paths.name: react
paths.message: Do not use useEffect. Use useMountEffect for mount-only external sync, derive state inline, use event handlers, or use TanStack Query. See /no-use-effect. Bump to 'error' once all existing call sites are refactored.

patterns.message: VCS provider implementations under services/vcs/vendor/** are vendor-specific. Do NOT import them directly — go through the provider-agnostic VCS layer (VcsProviderRegistry, VcsSyncService, VcsCommitService, VcsProviderClient, …) so VCS features stay provider-agnostic. The only files allowed to reference vendor code are the composition roots (app.ts, vcs-sync-runtime.ts), the VcsProviderRegistry that wires providers, the GitHub OAuth/connect HTTP route, and tests — see the allowlist in .oxlintrc.json.
